keywords: inline pure calculation fee breakdown no storeDocument no enqueue caller-owned computation
ironRules: T112 is INLINE_PURE — returns FeeBreakdown only, no storeDocument, no enqueue
T112 is called inline by T110 RevenueTracker — never via queue
T112 must not write to any index — any storeDocument call is BUILD_FAILURE per CF-09-5
T111 reads fee data from stored RevenueRecord written by T110 — never calls T112 again
